LanguageData.PyrinthStoveModSettings_Stove_fuelConsum: When turned on, stove continually consumes fuel in order to work. When turned off, stove works without fuel. Default is ON.
LanguageData.PyrinthStoveModSettings_Smithy_fuelConsu: When turned on, smithy continually consumes fuel in order to work. When turned off, smithy works without fuel. Default is ON.
LanguageData.PyrinthStoveModSettings_Smelter_fuelCons: When turned on, smelter continually consumes fuel in order to work. When turned off, stove works without fuel. Default is ON.
LanguageData.PyrinthStoveModSettings_Crematorium_fuel: When turned on, crematorium continually consumes fuel in order to work. When turned off, stove works without fuel. Default is ON.
LanguageData.PyrinthStoveModSettings_Boiler_fuelConsu: When turned on, boiler continually consumes fuel in order to work. When turned off, stove works without fuel. Default is ON.
